Enter an OpenAI-compatible API key for s: Enter an OpenAI-compatible API key for smart task extraction, recommendations, and more. The key is stored locally only.
Supports OpenAI-compatible API endpoints: Supports OpenAI-compatible API endpoints (e.g. Deepseek, local Ollama, etc.)
Display language for the app interface: Display language for the app interface
Plugins thirdparty intro: Install and manage .mltp add-ons: review what you’ve installed, browse the marketplace, or add a package from disk.
Plugins section installed subtitle: Enable, disable, or remove packages you’ve already added.
Plugins section marketplace subtitle: Install or update from configured registry URLs.
Plugins section local subtitle: Pick a .mltp file you built or downloaded.
Plugins installed empty hint: Browse the marketplace below, or use “Install from file” with a .mltp package.
Plugin dev mode hint: After rebuilding a plugin, reload the page to pick up changes.
No marketplace entries: No entries from registries (check network or add custom sources in docs).
Registry sources hint: One registry.json URL per line. First successful fetch wins per plugin id; failures fall back to cached data.
Cross-origin request blocked. Add {{orig: Cross-origin request blocked. Add {{origin}} to CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS on the server.
kanban_plugin_hint: When enabled, the Tasks tab shows list, calendar, and column board.
Modules intro: Turn core features on or off. Settings sync when cloud sync is enabled.
module_kanban_desc: Tasks tab with list, calendar, and column board.
module_time_capsule_desc: Occasional reminders of past stream entries.
module_energy_desc: Shows energy level beside the sync status in the tab bar.
module_think_session_desc: Lightweight scratchpad for sorting thoughts and turning notes into actions.
module_work_thread_desc: Resumable context runtime with scheduler support, runtime state, and hybrid Markdown sync.
work_thread_settings_intro: Choose how Now should treat resumable threads. This works even when the AI agent is disabled.
work_thread_settings_policy_hint_manual: Manual keeps task recommendations primary and only exposes thread continuation entry points.
work_thread_settings_policy_hint_coach: Coach surfaces a worthy thread first when it looks easy to resume, while still keeping tasks as fallback.
work_thread_settings_policy_hint_semi_au: Semi-auto makes thread recovery the default path in Now, then falls back to tasks.
work_thread_settings_show_auto_hint: Keep a system-driven view alongside the explicit task and thread tabs.
work_thread_settings_material_sidebar_hi: Use the shared left sidebar as the default source tray for both Think Session and Work Thread.
work_thread_settings_markdown_sync_hint: Keep a writable Markdown mirror for each thread so external editors can round-trip with the runtime.
work_thread_settings_markdown_root_place: Choose a local folder for thread Markdown files
work_thread_settings_auto_import_hint: When the current editor is clean, reload newer Markdown file changes automatically.
module_ai_agent_desc: Chat assistant with tools for tasks, stream, and roles (uses your AI settings).
module_advanced_filter_desc: Power filters in the stream (when available).
module_embedded_host_desc: Optional local desktop API, MCP, and plugin gateway host that can be fully disabled.
module_file_host_desc: Unified file hosting for images, documents, and other attachments.
kanban_settings_intro: Tune how the embedded board and fullscreen overview balance execution and summary.
kanban_wip_warning_hint: Highlight the doing lane when it moves beyond the configured WIP limit.
think_session_settings_intro: Control how light arrange and thread writing feel without splitting them into a different visual language.
think_session_sidebar_default_open_hint: Keep the task/context sidebar visible when entering the session workspace.
module_desktop_widget_desc: Mini companion: tasks, stream, and quick capture in a floating or pinned window (Tauri desktop).
module_window_context_desc: Annotate any foreground window (hotkey), optional advanced matching rules (Windows).
desktop_widget_intro: Open a compact companion with tabs (tasks / capture / stream), quick input, and role filter. Use the tray icon or hotkey for the annotator panel.
desktop_widget_mode: Default mode for new widget windows
desktop_widget_hint: Switch overlay / pin in the widget header. Global: Ctrl+Shift+Space opens annotation for the current window. Tray menu: annotate, widget, main, quit.
desktop_widget_tauri_only: Desktop widget is only available in the Tauri desktop app.
window_context_intro: Press Ctrl+Shift+Space to annotate the active window (notes + roles). Advanced: define process/title rules here for automatic matching.
window_context_tauri_only: Window context rules are stored locally and only apply in the Tauri desktop app on Windows.
Review the onboarding guide and contextu: Review the onboarding guide and contextual tips
Click on a shortcut area, then press a n: Click on a shortcut area, then press a new key combination to customize.
Export all data to a local file for back: Export all data to a local file for backup and transfer. Exported files include version info (v{{version}}).
Restore data from previously exported fi: Restore data from previously exported files. Supports JSON files and Markdown ZIP packages.
Import succeeded: {{tasks}} tasks, {{str: Import succeeded: {{tasks}} tasks, {{stream}} stream entries, {{settingsCount}} settings
Copy data from the current storage backe: Copy data from the current storage backend to another. Migration does not auto-switch; you need to update the config file (config.toml / .env) and restart.
Target data directory (optional, leave e: Target data directory (optional, leave empty to use current)
Migration succeeded: {{tasks}} tasks, {{: Migration succeeded: {{tasks}} tasks, {{stream}} stream entries, {{settingsCount}} settings. {{message}}
When enabled, each file save automatical: When enabled, each file save automatically syncs a copy to the specified local directory. The database remains the primary data source; this directory is a read-only mirror.
Data stored locally, this PC acts as ser: Data stored locally, this PC acts as server
Connect to remote server, don't start lo: Connect to remote server, don't start local backend
Saved — restart the app to apply: Saved — restart the app to apply
Data is read, written, and synced throug: Data is read, written, and synced through the API server. The PC desktop version auto-starts an embedded server; the web version uses the current domain.
This app now treats the server as the au: This app now treats the server as the authoritative backend in hosted mode. Deploying the main project server is enough to share data across clients.
Data is stored locally in SQLite. Cloud: Data is stored locally in SQLite. Cloud sync is configured separately from the app runtime.
Other devices can connect via LAN: Other devices can connect via LAN
127.0.0.1 = local only · 0.0.0.0 = all i: 127.0.0.1 = local only · 0.0.0.0 = all interfaces · or specify a network interface IP
Back up data to S3-compatible object sto: Back up data to S3-compatible object storage or a WebDAV server. This feature is under construction; some providers may not be fully available yet.
Web clients in hosted mode use the curre: Web clients in hosted mode use the current My Little Todo server directly as their runtime backend.
Cloud sync providers are configured on n: Cloud sync providers are configured on native clients only. If this hosted deployment still has old native sync settings stored, you can clear them here.
This is not a task manager — this is you: This is not a task manager — this is your external execution system.
See LICENSE in the repository root.
Exact versions are listed in package.jso: Exact versions are listed in package.json.
Display active task count next to each r: Display active task count next to each role
Show welcome card on role switch: Show welcome card on role switch
Show a brief overview when switching rol: Show a brief overview when switching roles
Hosted by the server — the backend addre: Hosted by the server — the backend address is fixed to the current domain.
Log out will clear your local session. Y: Log out will clear your local session. You can log in again anytime.
Choose how sync appears in the global st: Choose how sync appears in the global status dock.
Keep sync quiet when healthy; only expan: Keep sync quiet when healthy; only expand for attention states.
Show recent sync status in the dock even: Show recent sync status in the dock even when everything is healthy.
When enabled, the app may occasionally s: When enabled, the app may occasionally show an old inspiration in a toast. Default is off.
When enabled, the app may occasionally surface an older stream entry as a gentle reminder.
Get notified when deadlines are approach: Get notified when deadlines are approaching
Authentication mode for the embedded ser: Authentication mode for the embedded server
embedded_host_tauri_only: Embedded host is only available in the Tauri desktop app.
Optional local desktop API and MCP host. When disabled, no local port is exposed.
Other desktop tools should call this add: Other desktop tools should call this address right now.
The embedded host is not exposing a loca: The embedded host is not exposing a local port right now.
Saved changes are waiting for restart.
Saved settings will be used the next tim: Saved settings will be used the next time the embedded host starts.
Embedded host settings were saved. Resta: Embedded host settings were saved. Restart the embedded host to apply them.
Restart the embedded host to apply the n: Restart the embedded host to apply the new address and mode.
127.0.0.1 / localhost = local only. LAN: 127.0.0.1 / localhost = local only. LAN exposure is not wired yet in this desktop build.
Changing the port only takes effect afte: Changing the port only takes effect after the embedded host restarts.
Signup policy is inactive while embedded: Signup policy is inactive while embedded auth is unavailable.
Desktop embedded host currently supports: Desktop embedded host currently supports 127.0.0.1 or localhost only.
Desktop embedded host currently supports 127.0.0.1 / localhost and No Auth only.
LAN exposure, embedded auth, and signup: LAN exposure, embedded auth, and signup policy are not wired yet in this desktop build.
A shared API is provided by the admin. Y: A shared API is provided by the admin. You can also set your own key below.
AI is configured by the admin. A shared: AI is configured by the admin. A shared API is available for all users.
Allow users to set own API key: Allow users to set own API key
When disabled, users can only use the sh: When disabled, users can only use the shared API
Provide shared API for all users: Provide shared API for all users
Users without their own key will use thi: Users without their own key will use this shared API
Connect AI agents (Cursor, Claude Deskto: Connect AI agents (Cursor, Claude Desktop, etc.) to your task system via MCP protocol.
Control which MCP tools are available to: Control which MCP tools are available to AI agents. Disabled tools will not appear in tool listings.
module_mcp_desc: Expose your data to AI agents via MCP (Cursor, etc.) with permission controls.
module_time_awareness_desc: Learn when you work best, respect fixed blocks, and tune “Now” recommendations.
module_stream_context_panel_desc: Side panel in Stream view: projects, today's tasks, recent tags.
stream_context_panel_intro: Choose which sections appear in the Stream sidebar and how wide it opens.
time_awareness_intro: Time awareness uses your accept/skip history on recommendations and optional fixed blocks — not a contract, just context.
time_pattern_hint: Based on the last ~30 days of “Now” interactions (needs enough data).
MCP permission level hint: Read: list/search only. Create: + new tasks/stream. Full: + edits and deletes.
MCP role visibility all hint: AI can see tasks and stream entries for all roles.
MCP module disabled hint: Turn on the MCP integration switch above to enable the MCP endpoint and these settings.
Enable the Embedded Host module to expos: Enable the Embedded Host module to expose MCP on desktop.
Start the Embedded Host in settings to e: Start the Embedded Host in settings to expose MCP on desktop.
MCP server mode only: MCP is available when using the web/API server; the desktop app also exposes a local MCP endpoint on 127.0.0.1.
AI features are under development. Usage: AI features are under development. Usage statistics will appear here once available.
As admin, you will also see global usage: As admin, you will also see global usage statistics here.
Unable to reach update server. Please ch: Unable to reach update server. Please check your network or try again later.
Sync data across devices via an API serv: Sync data across devices via an API server or WebDAV. Configure a sync target and interval below.
Data syncs in real time through the API: Data syncs in real time through the API server. No separate sync target is needed on this client.
This backup uses the old file-based form: This backup uses the old file-based format. Please migrate with the migration tool or re-export from a current app version.
Paste JWT or long-lived API token: Paste JWT or long-lived API token
Generate a long-lived token from the ser: Generate a long-lived token from the server admin panel or API.
Conflicts are resolved automatically by: Conflicts are resolved automatically by timestamp.
You will be prompted to choose when conf: You will be prompted to choose when conflicts occur.
Generate a long-lived token for sync cli: Generate a long-lived token for sync clients, MCP integrations, or API access.
Copy this token now. It will not be show: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
stream_direction_hint: Bottom-up: newest at the bottom, composer below. Top-down: newest at the top, composer above.
stream_page_size_hint: Auto-load this many older entries when you reach the history edge. Default: 6.
This server is running in embedded auth: This server is running in embedded auth mode. Ask an admin to reset passwords if needed.
This desktop app uses the embedded local: This desktop app uses the embedded local backend and does not require sign-in.
